name: Coffee Fudge
recipeInstructions: A mildly flavored fudge for coffee lovers, topped with chocolate and nuts. Combine sugar, milk, instant coffee, coffee cream, and corn syrup in a 3-quart saucepan. Cover and bring to a boil over medium heat. Uncover and place a thermometer in the pan; cook without stirring until it reaches 236 degrees F (118 degrees C). Remove from heat; stir in butter and vanilla extract. Cool to lukewarm. Beat until the candy begins to thicken, then pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Melt chocolate coating over hot, not boiling water in a double boiler. Spread evenly over fudge and sprinkle nuts on top. Cut into squares once the candy has firmened up. Makes about 49 pieces.
